channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black bins and tv stand, 18th April
item.description:
Fly tipping black bag and tv stand

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent – Fly-tipping, Health Hazard & Vermin at Parry Place, 18th April
item.description:
Urgent – Fly-tipping, Health Hazard & Vermin at Parry Place, at the junction with Plumstead Road

item.title: Drain full solid, 18th April
item.description:
Drain at junction full solid
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 18th April
item.description:
The vehicle has not moved in over a month and does not seem to belong to any of the neighbours.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car in residential area, 18th April
item.description:
Car not moved for over 8 months owner don’t live here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 18th April
item.description:
Studholm Street Remove graffiti from bike hanger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Studholme Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 18th April
item.description:
Asylums Road opposite Grrvase Street Remove flypostering from lamppost column 242409 This may need to be removed by Street lighting using there raised platform used to replace the street light bulbs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Asylum Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several abandoned recycling containers, 18th April
item.description:
Left on the pavement by a tree near to number 78. I dont believe they don't belong to 78 as their containers are numbered

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in side alley, 18th April
item.description:
Absolutely disgusting another dump of rubbish in this alley. Feel like we are living in a slum

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbly tile, 18th April
item.description:
One of the tiles is wobbly. It is a trips and fall hazard. There's almost an inch gap. Check the lower part of the enclosed picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wandsworth Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip in a community pocket garden, 18th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish bags box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Vale Street, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Flyposters, 18th April
item.description:
Please remove two funfair posters on railings at end of pedestrian footbridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dumped rubbish, 18th April
item.description:
Only a day after you removed rubbish outside this white block of flats, its tenants have dumped more rubbish on public pavement. Can the council look into who owns this building and send them a letter ? Locals are fed up with constant rubbish dumped by tenants Please remove thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole by junction, 18th April
item.description:
This pothole causes a delay when pulling out at the junction making it dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste flytipped in communal area, 18th April
item.description:
Several sacks of builders waste, pallet and hard rubble appears to be dumped in communal area/garden behind houses 110 and 111. There also appears to be hardcore scattered throughout the area. Waste has been here for several weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stellman Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 18th April
item.description:
Rubbish boxes litters bottles bags poorly sweeping not good for environment
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Parade, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Santander Bike, 18th April
item.description:
Avignon Road by bike Hamger. Please clear an abandoned Santander bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avignon Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet and other items on ground, 18th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Inglis Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Bottom of Kingsley, 18th April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Bag full of gravel in road, 18th April
item.description:
This has been there for many weeks even after speaking to the resident about moving it. Could cause serious damage if a car has to swerve in to the on coming traffic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clive Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
